_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the AusMT licence instrument (mirrors columns.json). Edit ONLY here, then run `python contract/generate.py` to regenerate the LICENSES dict/object in engine/extract/_contract.py and portal/src/contract.js. redistributable = the EXACT, case-insensitive-after-trim-and-whitespace-collapse ids AusMT will byte-copy/serve (redistributable()); everything in recognised_only is a recognised licence but metadata-only (station listed, download -> archive). NC/ND stay redistributable-verbatim: legally permitted for unmodified non-commercial hosting AND it preserves the pre-C6 corpus behaviour, but now ONLY via exact ids -- the old prefix test `startswith("CC")` redistributed a typo'd 'CC-BY-4.O' or any 'CC-nonsense', which this exact-match list kills. `aliases` maps legacy bare survey.yaml values to their canonical id so old packages keep working WITHOUT hardcoding the mapping in code. `urls` is the human-readable licence deed URL per id (empty string = no single canonical URL, e.g. PUBLIC DOMAIN); used in the LICENSE.txt instrument that travels with the distributed bytes.
